markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 5
### Chapter 172. Rural Rail Transp. Districts
##### § 172.101 — Control of District

(a) The board is responsible for the management, operation, and control of the district.

(b) The right to control and regulate district affairs is vested exclusively in the board except as specifically otherwise provided by this chapter.

*Added by Acts 2009, 81st Leg., R.S., Ch. 85 (S.B.1540), Sec. 2.04, eff. April 1, 2011.*

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: The board is responsible for the management, operation, and control of the district.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: The right to control and regulate district affairs is vested exclusively in the board except as specifically otherwise provided by this chapter.
